changeSet.author: codex
codex
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO app_tool_definition ( code, name, summary, description_markdown, category_code, icon_key, tags_json, display_order, enabled, execution_mode, renderer_code, handler_code, input_schema_json, default_values_json, result_schema_json, server_config_json, timeout_ms, rate_limit_scope, rate_limit_max_requests, rate_limit_window_seconds, audit_enabled, payload_limit_bytes ) SELECT 'base64-encode', 'Base64 编码', '将输入文本转换为 Base64 字符串，适合快速做调试、报文处理和内容复制。', E'## 使用说明

- 输入原始文本
- 点击执行后直接返回 Base64 编码结果
- 该工具在浏览器本地执行，不会把文本提交给后端', 'encoding', 'code', '["编码","文本"]', 10, TRUE, 'CLIENT', 'text-workbench', 'base64-encode', '{"fields":[{"name":"text","label":"输入文本","type":"textarea","required":true,"maxLength":20000,"placeholder":"请输入需要编码的文本"}]}', '{"text":""}', '{"resultField":"encoded","copyable":true}', '{}', NULL, 'NONE', NULL, NULL, FALSE, 65536 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM app_tool_definition WHERE code = 'base64-encode' );
INSERT INTO app_tool_definition ( code, name, summary, description_markdown, category_code, icon_key, tags_json, display_order, enabled, execution_mode, renderer_code, handler_code, input_schema_json, default_values_json, result_schema_json, server_config_json, timeout_ms, rate_limit_scope, rate_limit_max_requests, rate_limit_window_seconds, audit_enabled, payload_limit_bytes ) SELECT 'base64-decode', 'Base64 解码', '将 Base64 字符串还原为 UTF-8 文本，便于排查编码后的响应和配置值。', E'## 使用说明

- 输入合法的 Base64 字符串
- 点击执行后返回解码后的文本
- 非法 Base64 输入会在前端直接报错', 'encoding', 'unlock', '["编码","文本"]', 20, TRUE, 'CLIENT', 'text-workbench', 'base64-decode', '{"fields":[{"name":"text","label":"Base64 文本","type":"textarea","required":true,"maxLength":20000,"placeholder":"请输入需要解码的 Base64 字符串"}]}', '{"text":""}', '{"resultField":"decoded","copyable":true}', '{}', NULL, 'NONE', NULL, NULL, FALSE, 65536 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM app_tool_definition WHERE code = 'base64-decode' );
INSERT INTO app_tool_definition ( code, name, summary, description_markdown, category_code, icon_key, tags_json, display_order, enabled, execution_mode, renderer_code, handler_code, input_schema_json, default_values_json, result_schema_json, server_config_json, timeout_ms, rate_limit_scope, rate_limit_max_requests, rate_limit_window_seconds, audit_enabled, payload_limit_bytes ) SELECT 'md5-digest', 'MD5 摘要', '对输入文本计算 MD5 摘要，适合做兼容性校验、文件指纹比对和联调验证。', E'## 使用说明

- 输入任意文本
- 工具会由后端计算 MD5 摘要
- 调用会记录执行日志，便于管理员排障与风控', 'hash', 'safety', '["摘要","校验"]', 30, TRUE, 'SERVER', 'text-workbench', 'md5-digest', '{"fields":[{"name":"text","label":"输入文本","type":"textarea","required":true,"maxLength":20000,"placeholder":"请输入需要计算摘要的文本"}]}', '{"text":""}', '{"resultField":"digest","copyable":true}', '{"algorithm":"MD5"}', 3000, 'USER_AND_IP', 20, 60, TRUE, 65536 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM app_tool_definition WHERE code = 'md5-digest' );
